name: entrasave
description: EntraSave — personal finance app. React (Vite) client + Node/Express API over SQL Server.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
